title: ม็อบมะพร้าวประจวบคีรีขันธ์ ทวงคำตอบ 3 หน่วยงาน ไร้เงา “ศุภจี” อย. ส่ง รองเลขาฯ ชี้แจง
desc: ประจวบคีรีขันธ์ ม็อบมะพร้าวบางสะพาน ทวงคำตอบ 3 หน่วยงาน ไร้เงา “ศุภจี” รมว.พาณิชย์ และ ก.เกษตรฯ ด้าน อย. ส่ง รองเลขาฯ เคลียร์ประเด็นหลังถูกโยงเอี่ยวจัดโควต้านำเข้ากะทิและผลิตภัณฑ์มะพร้าว
title_cn: 象岛椰农向 3 部门请愿查证副总理行踪与进口配额问题
summary_cn: 象岛 Prachuap Khiri Khan 班尼萨帕村椰农集团向商务部、农业部等 3 个部门正式请愿，质询副总理素帕基行踪，要求澄清和答复。FDA 派副秘书长出面澄清，该官员此前被指参与椰子及椰制品的进口配额安排，引发业界对政策公正性的争议。
desc_original: ประจวบคีรีขันธ์ ม็อบมะพร้าวบางสะพาน ทวงคำตอบ 3 หน่วยงาน ไร้เงา “ศุภจี” รมว.พาณิชย์ และ ก.เกษตรฯ ด้าน อย. ส่ง รองเลขาฯ เคลียร์ประเด็นหลังถูกโยงเอี่ยวจัดโควต้านำเข้ากะทิและผลิตภัณฑ์มะพร้าว

title: ปัญหา MG4 ใช้ไป 3 หมื่นโล เจออะไรบ้าง? แก้ตรงไหนจบ
desc: เจาะลึก...ปัญหา MG4 วิ่ง 30,000 กม. ยางหลังกินใน จอเอ๋อ ช่วงล่างดังกุกกัก เผยต้นตอวิศวกรรมพร้อมวิธีเคลมและแก้ไขให้จบจริง
title_cn: MG4 行驶 3 万公里常见故障与维修解决方案
summary_cn: 深度剖析 MG4 汽车在 30000 公里时出现的典型故障——后轮轮胎磨损、仪表盘显示异常、底盘异响等，披露问题的工程根源，并详细介绍官方理赔流程和彻底维修方案，帮助车主从根本上解决问题。
desc_original: เจาะลึก...ปัญหา MG4 วิ่ง 30,000 กม. ยางหลังกินใน จอเอ๋อ ช่วงล่างดังกุกกัก เผยต้นตอวิศวกรรมพร้อมวิธีเคลมและแก้ไขให้จบจริง

title: ไทยสมุทรฯ ปลุกพลังรัก เปิดแผนรุกไตรมาส 3
desc: OCEAN LIFE ไทยสมุทรประกันชีวิต ประกาศทิศทางดำเนินธุรกิจไตรมาส 3 ชู “รักตัวเอง เพื่อมีพลังดูแลทุกความรัก” สำหรับ Sandwich Generation
title_cn: 泰国海洋生命保险启动第 3 季度发展计划
summary_cn: 泰国海洋生命保险公司（OCEAN LIFE）对外宣布第 3 季度业务方向和发展计划，以「爱自己、才有力量照顾所有的爱」为主题，针对夹心代族（身上压着照顾父母与子女双重责任的中年群体）设计和推出新的保险产品及服务方案。
desc_original: OCEAN LIFE ไทยสมุทรประกันชีวิต ประกาศทิศทางดำเนินธุรกิจไตรมาส 3 ชู “รักตัวเอง เพื่อมีพลังดูแลทุกความรัก” สำหรับ Sandwich Generation

title: กรรมการ กมอ. ผวา! เจอ “หนังสือลับ”ส่งถึงรายบุคคล จี้ให้ทบทวนมติผลิตเหล็ก
desc: กมอ. เจอ “หนังสือลับ” ส่งถึงรายบุคคล หลังมีมติยกระดับกระบวนการผลิตเหล็กเพื่อความปลอดภัย จี้ให้ทบทวนการพิจารณาและการลงมติ อ้างให้ตระหนักถึงความรับผิดชอบต่อความเสียหายทางแพ่งที่อาจเกิดขึ้น
title_cn: 工业促进委员会被质询钢铁生产决议的合规性
summary_cn: 泰国工业促进委员会接收到秘密信函，质疑其通过的钢铁生产安全流程提升决议。信函作者要求委员会重新审视当初的表决程序和决议内容，并声称相关决策参与者应就可能造成的民事损害承担法律责任。
desc_original: กมอ. เจอ “หนังสือลับ” ส่งถึงรายบุคคล หลังมีมติยกระดับกระบวนการผลิตเหล็กเพื่อความปลอดภัย จี้ให้ทบทวนการพิจารณาและการลงมติ อ้างให้ตระหนักถึงความรับผิดชอบต่อความเสียหายทางแพ่งที่อาจเกิดขึ้น

title: ปลดแอกค่าไฟแฝง 1.7 หมื่นล้านในบิลประชาชน แยกไฟสาธารณะเป็นผู้ใช้ประเภทที่ 10
desc: ชงที่ประชุมกพช. 15 ก.ค.​2569 เพิ่มประเภทผู้ใช้ไฟอีก 2 ประเภทจาก 8 เป็น 10 โดยประเภทที่ 9 เป็นกลุ่มดาต้าเซ็นเตอร์ ส่วนประเภทที่ 10 เป็นกลุ่มไฟฟ้าสาธารณะ ที่แฝงเข้ามาในบิลค่าไฟประชาชน
title_cn: 泰国电价改革：分离隐性成本 1.7 万百万
summary_cn: 泰国能源政策委员会提议调整用户分类，从现有 8 种增至 10 种，新增数据中心和公用电两个用户类别。这一改革旨在将原本隐含在普通民众电费账单中约 1.7 万百万的公用电成本分离出来单独计价。
desc_original: ชงที่ประชุมกพช. 15 ก.ค.​2569 เพิ่มประเภทผู้ใช้ไฟอีก 2 ประเภทจาก 8 เป็น 10 โดยประเภทที่ 9 เป็นกลุ่มดาต้าเซ็นเตอร์ ส่วนประเภทที่ 10 เป็นกลุ่มไฟฟ้าสาธารณะ ที่แฝงเข้ามาในบิลค่าไฟประชาชน

title: หนุน SME ข้าวไทยสู่ตลาดโลก คต. จับมือ สสว.ดันผู้ประกอบการสู่แดนมังกร
desc: กรมการค้าต่างประเทศ ผนึก สสว. ยกระดับ SME ข้าวไทย ก้าวสู่ตลาดโลก จัดงาน “Thai Rice Roadshow : Think Rice Think Thailand” ณ นครกวางโจว หวังสร้างโอกาสทางการค้า ผลักดันข้าวไทยเจาะตลาดจีน
title_cn: 泰国政府助力大米SME拓展全球市场
summary_cn: 泰国商务部与中小企业推进处携手推动本地大米产业国际化。双方在广州举办「泰国大米产业路演」活动，旨在为泰国米业企业创造贸易机遇，开拓中国市场。此举有助于提升泰国大米在国际市场的竞争力与品牌形象。
desc_original: กรมการค้าต่างประเทศ ผนึก สสว. ยกระดับ SME ข้าวไทย ก้าวสู่ตลาดโลก จัดงาน “Thai Rice Roadshow : Think Rice Think Thailand” ณ นครกวางโจว หวังสร้างโอกาสทางการค้า ผลักดันข้าวไทยเจาะตลาดจีน

title: Southeast Asia sets pace for Gemini usage
desc: The number of active users on the Google Gemini app in Southeast Asia has more than doubled in a year, driven by Gen Z and local language capability.
title_cn: 东南亚成为Gemini应用使用增长最快地区
summary_cn: 谷歌(Google)旗下生成式AI应用Gemini在东南亚地区表现突出，过去一年活跃用户数翻番增长。这一增长主要得益于Z世代用户的积极采用，以及本地语言支持功能的不断完善，为地区用户提供更贴切的AI体验。
desc_original: The number of active users on the Google Gemini app in Southeast Asia has more than doubled in a year, driven by Gen Z and local language capability.

title: "บัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐ 2569" หากผ่านเกณฑ์คุณสมบัติรอบอุทธรณ์แล้ว ต้องทำอย่างไร
desc: ผู้ลงทะเบียน "บัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐ 2569" หากผ่านเกณฑ์คุณสมบัติรอบอุทธรณ์แล้ว ต้องทำอย่างไร เริ่มใช้สิทธิได้วันไหน
title_cn: 泰国2569年国家福利卡通过审核后的办理流程
summary_cn: 针对已通过泰国2569年(即2026年)国家福利卡审核申请的民众，官方说明了后续办理步骤和权益启用时间。该福利卡是泰国政府的重要社会保障项目，为符合条件的国民提供多项福利支持，涉及日常生活的实际权益。
desc_original: ผู้ลงทะเบียน "บัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐ 2569" หากผ่านเกณฑ์คุณสมบัติรอบอุทธรณ์แล้ว ต้องทำอย่างไร เริ่มใช้สิทธิได้วันไหน

title: “บีวายดี-เรเว่”ย้ำ 4 ความสำเร็จ
desc: บีวายดี ประเทศไทย และ เรเว่ ร่วมฉลอง 4 หมุดหมายสำคัญ ตอกย้ำความสำเร็จในไทย ร่วมสร้างระบบนิเวศของยานยนต์พลังงานสะอาด
title_cn: 比亚迪(BYD)与蕾威(Revv)强调在泰合作四大成就
summary_cn: 比亚迪(BYD)泰国公司与蕾威(Revv)共同庆祝战略合作的四项重要里程碑，彰显两家企业在泰国清洁能源汽车生态系统建设中的显著成绩。此合作体现了国际新能源车企对泰国绿色汽车产业发展的长期承诺。
desc_original: บีวายดี ประเทศไทย และ เรเว่ ร่วมฉลอง 4 หมุดหมายสำคัญ ตอกย้ำความสำเร็จในไทย ร่วมสร้างระบบนิเวศของยานยนต์พลังงานสะอาด

title: Luxury car sales likely to slow amid stricter lending
desc: Thailand's premium and luxury car market is bracing for a slowdown as household debt, sluggish economic growth and stricter lending criteria weigh on consumer demand, says Performance Motors, a subsidiary of Malaysia-based Sime Motors and authorised dealer for BMW, Mini and Porsche.
title_cn: 贷款条件趋严拖累泰国豪车销售增速
summary_cn: 泰国高端与豪华车市场面临增长放缓。在家庭债务高企、经济增长乏力和贷款审批标准更严的三重压力下，宝马(BMW)、迷你(Mini)和保时捷(Porsche)授权经销商预计销售将显著下滑。这反映出泰国消费市场受到宏观经济约束的深度影响。
desc_original: Thailand's premium and luxury car market is bracing for a slowdown as household debt, sluggish economic growth and stricter lending criteria weigh on consumer demand, says Performance Motors, a subsidiary of Malaysia-based Sime Motors and authorised dealer for BMW, Mini and Porsche.

title: PepsiCo doubles down on local resilience
desc: The world has shifted from an era of seamless globalisation to a period of significant disruptions characterised by fragmented supply chains, geopolitical tensions and growing concerns about climate change.
title_cn: 百事公司加强本地韧性投资
summary_cn: 全球格局从无缝全球化向碎片化供应链、地缘政治紧张局势和气候变化风险并存的时代转变。在此背景下，百事公司着力加强在泰国等市场的本地布局和供应链韧性建设，以应对日益复杂的商业环境和外部冲击。
desc_original: The world has shifted from an era of seamless globalisation to a period of significant disruptions characterised by fragmented supply chains, geopolitical tensions and growing concerns about climate change.

title: Panel to discuss street lighting costs
desc: The National Energy Policy Council (NEPC) is scheduled to meet on Wednesday to determine who should bear the cost of electricity for public street lighting, an expense currently shouldered solely by consumers, which contributes to rising household power bills.
title_cn: 能源委员会讨论街道路灯电费分担方案
summary_cn: 泰国国家能源政策委员会将于周三召开会议，讨论公共街道照明电费的承担责任。目前街灯电费由消费者单独承担，这推高了家庭电费账单，成为影响民众生活成本的关键议题。委员会的决议将影响未来电费分配政策。
desc_original: The National Energy Policy Council (NEPC) is scheduled to meet on Wednesday to determine who should bear the cost of electricity for public street lighting, an expense currently shouldered solely by consumers, which contributes to rising household power bills.

title: JAS absorbs World Cup loss, looks to 2030 gains
desc: Jasmine International Plc (JAS) faces a marginal loss of around 100 million baht from acquiring the broadcasting rights to the Fifa World Cup 2026, attributed to a shortfall in sponsorship revenue, inflexible marketing packages and inconvenient match times.
title_cn: 茉莉花国际公司吸收世界杯亏损，瞄准 2030 年机遇
summary_cn: 泰国茉莉花国际公司因获得 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯转播权面临约 1 亿泰铢的边际亏损，主要原因包括赞助收入短缺、营销方案不够灵活以及比赛时间不适合亚洲市场。公司期望通过 2030 年世界杯恢复投资收益并扩大市场影响力。
desc_original: Jasmine International Plc (JAS) faces a marginal loss of around 100 million baht from acquiring the broadcasting rights to the Fifa World Cup 2026, attributed to a shortfall in sponsorship revenue, inflexible marketing packages and inconvenient match times.

title: SEC mulls change to self-reporting
desc: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is considering reviewing its shareholder disclosure framework to strengthen investor confidence and avoid a repeat of the recent incorrect self-declared reporting that involved True Corporation.
title_cn: 证交会拟修订自行申报规则
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会考虑审查股东信息披露框架，旨在增强投资者信心，避免重复真集团（True Corporation）自行申报不准确的问题，进一步完善市场监管机制和投资者保护制度。
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is considering reviewing its shareholder disclosure framework to strengthen investor confidence and avoid a repeat of the recent incorrect self-declared reporting that involved True Corporation.

title: Phuket beaches to be 'restored'
desc: Natural Resources and Environment Minister Suchart Chomklin on Tuesday vowed to press ahead with reclaiming encroached public beaches in Phuket, enforcing court rulings and removing illegal structures.
title_cn: 普吉岛海滩拟恢复原状
summary_cn: 泰国自然资源与环保部长苏查特（Suchart Chomklin）表示将继续推进收回普吉岛被占用的公共海滩项目，严格执行法院判决并拆除非法建筑，以保护海滩生态和公众权益。
desc_original: Natural Resources and Environment Minister Suchart Chomklin on Tuesday vowed to press ahead with reclaiming encroached public beaches in Phuket, enforcing court rulings and removing illegal structures.

title: DNA tests find blackchin tilapia in cans
desc: DNA tests have confirmed that fish found in canned products seized from a factory in Samut Sakhon were blackchin tilapia, an invasive species, rather than Nile tilapia as the government previously claimed, opposition lawmakers and the BioThai Foundation said on Tuesday.
title_cn: DNA检测证实罐头鱼为入侵物种黑鲷
summary_cn: DNA检测证实从沙没他空府（Samut Sakhon）一家工厂查获的罐头鱼为黑鲷鱼，是一种入侵物种，而非政府此前声称的尼罗河鲶鱼。反对派议员和泰国生物科技基金会（BioThai Foundation）周二披露了这一检测结果，涉及食品安全问题，引发对食品监管的担忧。
desc_original: DNA tests have confirmed that fish found in canned products seized from a factory in Samut Sakhon were blackchin tilapia, an invasive species, rather than Nile tilapia as the government previously claimed, opposition lawmakers and the BioThai Foundation said on Tuesday.

title: Govt denies rail termination
desc: The government has denied reports that it has already decided to terminate the public-private partnership contract for the high-speed rail project linking Don Mueang, Suvarnabhumi and U-Tapao airports.
title_cn: 政府否认已决定终止高铁PPP合同
summary_cn: 泰国政府澄清并未决定终止连接廊曼机场（Don Mueang）、素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）和乌塔堡机场（U-Tapao）的高速铁路项目的公私合作伙伴关系（PPP）合同。该声明旨在打消市场对该区域基建项目终止的传言，稳定投资者信心。
desc_original: The government has denied reports that it has already decided to terminate the public-private partnership contract for the high-speed rail project linking Don Mueang, Suvarnabhumi and U-Tapao airports.

title: Ministry seeks to bridge economies at global summit
desc: Thailand will champion its role as a "connected economy", helping to bridge a fragmented world at this October's International Monetary Fund-World Bank Annual Meetings, says Finance Minister Ekniti Nitithanprapas.
title_cn: 财政部长欲在全球峰会推动经济融合
summary_cn: 泰国财政部长艾克尼提·尼提坦普拉帕斯（Ekniti Nitithanprapas）表示，泰国将在今年10月的国际货币基金组织—世界银行年会（IMF-World Bank Annual Meetings）上倡导其「连接经济体」的角色，以帮助弥合分裂的世界经济，体现泰国在全球经济中的战略地位。
desc_original: Thailand will champion its role as a "connected economy", helping to bridge a fragmented world at this October's International Monetary Fund-World Bank Annual Meetings, says Finance Minister Ekniti Nitithanprapas.

title: PM to meet President Xi, Li in China
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul will pay an official visit to China from July 16–20 at the invitation of Chinese Premier Li Qiang.
title_cn: 泰国总理将赴华进行高层会晤
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷·詹维拉库尔（Anutin Charnvirakul）应中国总理李强邀请，将于7月16日至20日进行为期5天的官方访华。该访问预期将包括与中国国家主席习近平的高层会晤，旨在深化泰中战略伙伴关系，推进双边经贸合作与人文交流。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul will pay an official visit to China from July 16–20 at the invitation of Chinese Premier Li Qiang.

title: Fire spurs venue law rethink
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has pledged a sweeping review of Thailand's entertainment venue laws and zoning regulations following the deadly fire at Rong Beer Na Ladprao.
title_cn: 火灾促使政府重新审视娱乐场所法规
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷·詹维拉库尔在荣啤酒吧（Rong Beer Na Ladprao）致命火灾事件后，承诺进行全面审查泰国娱乐场所法律和地区分区规定。该事件造成重大人员伤亡，引发对公众场所安全监管的广泛关注。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has pledged a sweeping review of Thailand's entertainment venue laws and zoning regulations following the deadly fire at Rong Beer Na Ladprao.

title: Justice minister defends DSI probe into forex scam
desc: Justice Minister Pol Lt Gen Rutthapon Naowarat has rejected claims that the Department of Special Investigation rushed its investigation into the Forex fraud case involving People's Party list MP Pawoot Pongvitayapanu.
title_cn: 司法部长为特别调查部外汇欺诈案调查进行辩护
summary_cn: 司法部长Pol Lt Gen Rutthapon Naowarat驳斥了关于特别调查部（DSI）仓促调查人民党国会议员Pawoot Pongvitayapanu涉及外汇欺诈案的指控。此案引发了外界对调查程序透明度和公正性的关注。
desc_original: Justice Minister Pol Lt Gen Rutthapon Naowarat has rejected claims that the Department of Special Investigation rushed its investigation into the Forex fraud case involving People's Party list MP Pawoot Pongvitayapanu.

title: Deportation rule receives cabinet nod
desc: The country's first formal regulations governing the deportation of foreign nationals have been approved by the cabinet, introducing a framework to expedite the removal of foreigners who violate immigration and criminal laws.
title_cn: 泰国驱逐外国人新规获内阁批准
summary_cn: 泰国首次正式颁布针对外国人驱逐的法规框架，已获内阁批准。该规定为快速驱逐违反移民和刑事法律的外国人提供了法律依据，标志着泰国移民管理进入更规范阶段。
desc_original: The country's first formal regulations governing the deportation of foreign nationals have been approved by the cabinet, introducing a framework to expedite the removal of foreigners who violate immigration and criminal laws.

title: OJC gives former chief justice the chop
desc: The Office of the Judicial Commission (OJC) on Tuesday dismissed a former chief justice of the Civil Court in Bangkok for showing favouritism in cases related to the Narongdej family dispute.
title_cn: 司法委员会撤销曼谷前民事法院首席法官职务
summary_cn: 泰国司法委员会（OJC）因前民事法院首席法官在Narongdej家族纠纷案中表现出偏私，于周二将其撤职。此举体现了司法系统对廉正审理的严格要求。
desc_original: The Office of the Judicial Commission (OJC) on Tuesday dismissed a former chief justice of the Civil Court in Bangkok for showing favouritism in cases related to the Narongdej family dispute.

title: Thailand vs Vietnam in 2026: who’s really winning the economy and tourism race?
desc: Thailand vs Vietnam in 2026: who’s really winning the economy and tourism race? Legacy ANALYSIS: The talk of Vietnam surpassing Thailand is everywhere, from Nikkei Asia to Bangkok boardrooms. Here is where the two economies and tourism industries actually stand, why the crown has not changed hands, and where Vietnam has already won. For years, the idea that Vietnam would one day overtake Thailand felt like a distant hypothetical. In 2026, it has become the region’s most talked-about economic question, debated in Tokyo, Taipei, Hanoi and Bangkok alike. Nikkei Asia reported in January that Vietnam is on course to surpass Thailand in nominal gross domestic product as early as this year, which would make it Southeast Asia’s third-largest economy behind Indonesia. Thai outlets from Khaosod to The Nation picked up the story within days, while Vietnamese state media has embraced the narrative with enthusiasm. Vietnam’s economy grew 8.02% in 2025, one of the fastest rates in the world, taking its nominal GDP to around US$514 billion. Hanoi has set a target of 10% annual growth from 2026 to 2030, backed by a state-led infrastructure blitz that includes the new Long T

title: กมธ.สิ่งแวดล้อม ลุยสระบุรีไล่บี้ ขรก. เกียร์ว่าง แฉท่อปริศนาปล่อยสารพิษปลาตายเกลื่อน
desc: ประธาน กมธ.ที่ดินและสิ่งแวดล้อม ควงคู่ กมธ.ตำรวจ บุกสระบุรี สางปัญหาน้ำเสียรุกป่า จวก ขรก.ทำตัวเป็น “เสือกระดาษ”
title_cn: 环保委员会联合警方突袭沙拉武里，揭露神秘排污管道毒害水体导致鱼类大量死亡
summary_cn: 泰国环保委员会主席与警务委员会联合突击进入沙拉武里府，调查污水侵入林区问题。调查发现一条神秘的排污管道正向水体排放有毒物质，导致大量鱼类死亡。相关部门因行动不力被讽为「纸老虎」，环保破坏问题持续得不到有效制止。

title: Defence industry partnership with Malaysia expands
desc: Thailand and Malaysia have agreed to forge closer cooperation in security, border development and the defence industry, with both countries looking to elevate bilateral ties to a “strategic partnership for peace and development”, according to Thailand’s Public Relations Department.
title_cn: 泰马国防产业伙伴关系深化拓展
summary_cn: 泰国与马来西亚达成新协议，将深化在安全、边界发展及国防产业领域的合作。双方计划将双边关系升级至「和平与发展战略伙伴关系」新高度，根据泰国公共关系部声明。此举旨在加强两国在地区安全事务上的协调与交流。
desc_original: Thailand and Malaysia have agreed to forge closer cooperation in security, border development and the defence industry, with both countries looking to elevate bilateral ties to a “strategic partnership for peace and development”, according to Thailand’s Public Relations Department.

title: Bangkok Blueprint มาตรฐานใหม่ที่ไทยกำหนด จับตา IMF-World Bank 2026 ในไทยเดือนตุลาคมนี้
desc: ธปท. ชูไฮไลต์ “Bangkok Blueprint” กรอบนโยบาย 12 ข้อรับมือภัยทุจริตทางดิจิทัล พร้อมยกระดับงานนี้คือวาระแห่งชาติที่ไทยจะได้โชว์ศักยภาพประเทศไทยในฐานะเจ้าภาพการประชุม IMF-World Bank 2026
title_cn: 「Bangkok Blueprint」——泰国推出新框架应对数字腐败，十月迎IMF-World Bank年会
summary_cn: 泰国央行推出「Bangkok Blueprint」政策框架，包含12项措施应对数字化腐败威胁。该框架被定位为国家级重点议程，泰国将在今年10月主办IMF与世界银行年度会议期间展示国家治理能力和反腐成果。
desc_original: ธปท. ชูไฮไลต์ “Bangkok Blueprint” กรอบนโยบาย 12 ข้อรับมือภัยทุจริตทางดิจิทัล พร้อมยกระดับงานนี้คือวาระแห่งชาติที่ไทยจะได้โชว์ศักยภาพประเทศไทยในฐานะเจ้าภาพการประชุม IMF-World Bank 2026

title: New liver fluke test under review
desc: Thai health authorities will retain stool examinations as the standard test for liver fluke infection after follow-up tests confirmed only four infections among 292 university students who had initially tested positive using a new urine screening kit, raising questions about the test’s performance in a real-world setting.
title_cn: 新型肝吸虫检测试剂审查中
summary_cn: 泰国卫生部门在评估一种新型尿液筛查试剂盒的准确性。初期测试中292名大学生尿检阳性，但跟踪复查仅确认4例实际感染。由于准确率严重不足，卫生部门决定继续采用传统粪便检查作为肝吸虫感染的标准诊断方法。
desc_original: Thai health authorities will retain stool examinations as the standard test for liver fluke infection after follow-up tests confirmed only four infections among 292 university students who had initially tested positive using a new urine screening kit, raising questions about the test’s performance in a real-world setting.

title: 5,000 dishonest officials to lose jobs over exam scandal
desc: All key suspects in the civil service exam rigging scandal have been arrested, the officials who conspired with them will be charged and exam cheats will lose their jobs, senior officials said on Tuesday.
title_cn: 五千名不诚实公务员因考试舞弊丑闻面临失业
summary_cn: 公务员考试作弊案件已全面破获，所有主要嫌疑人已被逮捕。参与舞弊的约5000名官员将被开除公职，共谋官员将受到刑事起诉。这是泰国政府打击公务员系统腐败、维护考试公正的重要举措，有助于提升国家廉政建设。
desc_original: All key suspects in the civil service exam rigging scandal have been arrested, the officials who conspired with them will be charged and exam cheats will lose their jobs, senior officials said on Tuesday.

title: New Thai-Malaysian checkpoint a boon for tourism
desc: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) is excited about the prospect of more visitors from Malaysia entering Thailand through a new, bigger checkpoint in Sadao district of Songkhla, but residents in the town where the old checkpoint is located don’t feel like celebrating.
title_cn: 新泰马边检站助力旅游发展
summary_cn: 泰国旅游局对宋卡府沙敦县（Sadao）新建的泰马联合边检站寄予厚望，该设施规模更大、通关效率更高，预期将吸引更多马来西亚游客入泰旅游。但旧边检站所在城镇的当地居民对此持保留态度，担忧新站运营后对原有社区经济的冲击。
desc_original: The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) is excited about the prospect of more visitors from Malaysia entering Thailand through a new, bigger checkpoint in Sadao district of Songkhla, but residents in the town where the old checkpoint is located don’t feel like celebrating.

title: Cabinet approves ‘Care’ formula pension reform
desc: The cabinet has approved a new calculation method for pensions from the Social Security Fund, aimed at improving fairness and aligning Thailand’s pension system with international standards, Labour Minister Julapun Amornvivat said on Tuesday.
title_cn: 内阁批准「Care」公式养老金改革方案
summary_cn: 泰国内阁正式批准社会保险基金养老金计算的新公式方法。这一改革旨在提高养老金体系的公平性和透明度，使泰国养老金制度更好地与国际标准接轨。该方案对在泰长期工作和居住的外籍人士及其退休福利待遇有直接影响。
desc_original: The cabinet has approved a new calculation method for pensions from the Social Security Fund, aimed at improving fairness and aligning Thailand’s pension system with international standards, Labour Minister Julapun Amornvivat said on Tuesday.

title: Visa-free period halved, many countries dropped
desc: Thailand’s cabinet on Tuesday halved the tourist visa-free period, dropped many countries from the scheme and approved new privileges for other nationalities — including Indian tourists, whose numbers have plunged.
title_cn: 泰国缩减免签期限，多国被移出名单
summary_cn: 泰国内阁本周二将旅游免签期限由60天缩短至30天，并将许多国家从该计划中移除。同时为包括印度在内的其他国籍游客开放新的优惠政策。此举是在印度游客人数大幅下滑后做出的调整，旨在恢复赴泰旅游吸引力。
desc_original: Thailand’s cabinet on Tuesday halved the tourist visa-free period, dropped many countries from the scheme and approved new privileges for other nationalities — including Indian tourists, whose numbers have plunged.

title: Pub inferno death toll rises to 30
desc: The death toll in the blaze at the Rong Beer Na Ladprao entertainment venue was confirmed at 30 on Tuesday morning, with authorities still struggling to identify all the bodies.
title_cn: 曼谷Rong Beer酒吧火灾死亡人数升至30人
summary_cn: 位于曼谷的Rong Beer Na Ladprao娱乐场所发生火灾，周二早间确认死亡人数达30人，当局仍在努力识别遇难者身份。这起重大安全事故引发对公共场所防火设施和应急预案的关注。
desc_original: The death toll in the blaze at the Rong Beer Na Ladprao entertainment venue was confirmed at 30 on Tuesday morning, with authorities still struggling to identify all the bodies.

title: เปิดเส้นทาง"ดาวนภา พัชรชัย" ผู้หญิงที่รวยที่สุดของไทยจากพนักงานธนาคารสู่มหาเศรษฐี 4.57หมื่นล้านบาท

title_cn: 从银行职员到泰国女首富：Dawnavpha Patcharchai的创业传奇
summary_cn: 泰国资本公司创始人Dawnavpha Patcharchai凭借30多年的小额信贷帝国建立，登顶2026年Forbes泰国最富女性榜单，个人资产达457亿泰铢。她从普通银行职员起家，通过深耕微金融领域实现财富增长，展现了泰国女性企业家的杰出成就。

title: Decline in Indian arrivals prompts Thailand to restore visa-free scheme
desc: Decline in Indian arrivals prompts Thailand to restore visa-free scheme Legacy Thailand’s Ministry of Tourism and Sports restored a visa-free scheme for Indian tourists , allowing visitors from India to stay for up to 30 days after officials reported a decline in arrivals following recent visa changes. In May, the Cabinet ended the temporary 60-day visa exemption that had applied to citizens of 93 countries and territories. The government said the measure had been abused by some foreign nationals to work illegally, operate businesses without permission and commit other offences. Officials said tourism data showed that most genuine visitors stayed in Thailand for 30 days or less, making the previous 60-day exemption unnecessary for the majority of travellers. Following the policy change, Thailand reinstated the standard 30-day visa exemption for citizens of 57 countries. At the same time, authorities began reviewing entry conditions for countries outside that list, with some expected to receive shorter visa-on-arrival or visa exemption periods. title_cn: 印度游客人数下滑促泰国恢复免签政策
summary_cn: 泰国旅游和体育部为应对印度游客人数下降，恢复对印度游客的免签政策，允许印度访客免签停留30天。今年5月泰国曾将93国的60天免签缩减至30天以防止滥用。新政策同时为57个国家维持30天免签，其他国家实施不同期限的落地签或免签安排。
desc_original: Decline in Indian arrivals prompts Thailand to restore visa-free scheme Legacy Thailand’s Ministry of Tourism and Sports restored a visa-free scheme for Indian tourists , allowing visitors from India to stay for up to 30 days after officials reported a decline in arrivals following recent visa changes. In May, the Cabinet ended the temporary 60-day visa exemption that had applied to citizens of 93 countries and territories. The government said the measure had been abused by some foreign nationals to work illegally, operate businesses without permission and commit other offences. Officials said tourism data showed that most genuine visitors stayed in Thailand for 30 days or less, making the previous 60-day exemption unnecessary for the majority of travellers. Following the policy change, Thailand reinstated the standard 30-day visa exemption for citizens of 57 countries. At the same time, authorities began reviewing entry conditions for countries outside that list, with some expected to receive shorter visa-on-arrival or visa exemption periods. title: Jomtien drug raid nets two suspected dealers, detains 81
desc: Jomtien drug raid nets two suspected dealers, detains 81 Legacy A Jomtien drug raid led by Bang Lamung district officials yesterday, July 13, resulted in the arrest of two suspected drug dealers and the detention of 81 people who tested positive for drug use . The operation took place in Soi Jomtien 2 and Soi Jomtien 3, Nong Prue subdistrict, Bang Lamung district, Chon Buri. It followed complaints from residents, who said the area had become a major gathering point for drug users and dealers, with suspected transactions taking place throughout the day. According to district officials, the investigation found a constant flow of people entering the alleys to buy drugs, with motorbikes and cars coming and going throughout the day. Officials divided into several teams and simultaneously surrounded multiple locations to prevent suspects from escaping. Photo via Facebook: We Love Pattaya When the operation began, many suspects attempted to flee in different directions. Some escaped by using their knowledge of the area, while others were detained at exits secured by officials. The first suspect arrested was 21 year old Waranyu Wongsaeng. Officials allegedly found 66 methamphetamine pills

title: More Thai and Chinese scammers held for deceiving son to steal from mother
desc: More Thai and Chinese scammers held for deceiving son to steal from mother Legacy Cyber Crime investigation Bureau (CCIB) officers arrested one Thai woman and three Chinese nationals for operating a call centre scam and deceiving a 19 year old son into stealing nearly 11 million baht in cash and valuables from his mother from his mother. The victim, identified only as Mick, was targeted in November last year by fraudsters posing as police officers . The gang falsely claimed that Mick was linked to criminal activity and instructed him to surrender all cash and valuables belonging to himself and his mother so they could be inspected to prove his innocence . Believing the claims, Mick allegedly broke into his mother’s safe and handed over property worth almost 11 million baht. The assets included gold jewellery valued at about 3.2 million baht, diamond jewellery, valuable Buddhist amulets and cash. Photo via MGR Online The investigation initially led police to a 31 year old Chinese national, Qin Hao, who was accused of collecting the valuables from Mick at a meeting point in Pak Kret district, Nonthaburi. Police also identified two additional Chinese suspects, 31 year old Huang

title: 从银行到加密货币“一网追踪”！泰国正式启用“CHECKED”金融数据核查系统
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国政府正加紧推进“连点成线”金融数据核查战略，正式启用“CHECKED”系统，旨在堵塞灰色产业资金漏洞、切断电信诈骗团伙的资金转移通道。该战略通过联通四大核心部门的数据，实现对洗钱行为、傀儡账户及加密货币交易的有效监管，助力泰国朝着区域金融中心的目标迈进。 7月14日，泰国副总理兼财政部长埃尼提以“金融数据连通以提升可疑交易追踪核查能力”小组委员会主席身份表示，当前电信诈骗团伙和网络犯罪分子在骗取受害人钱款后，并不会将资金滞留一处，而是通过多层流转以掩盖资金来源。具体手法包括：先将款项转入某一银行账户，随后迅速转至其他账户，再转换为数字资产以增加追查难度；部分资金则被用于购买黄金，借助黄金交易便捷、变现迅速的特点，最终通过伪装合法的公司账户流向境外。 埃尼提指出，过去存在的问题在于，各相关部门仅掌握各自环节的金融交易数据，信息未能有效整合。例如，泰国中央银行只能监测银行体系内的资金流动，证券交易委员会仅能掌握数字资产交易数据，反洗钱办公室只能获取被上报的可疑交易信息，商业发展厅则仅了解公司注册结构。由于没有任何一个部门能够掌握完整的资金流转链条，即便各部门各司其职，仍难免存在监管盲区，导致资金屡屡“漏网”。 为此，在2026年7月13日举行的小组委员会会议上，相关部门汇报了四项措施。这些措施并非各自为政，而是紧密围绕犯罪分子实际惯用的资金流转路径，逐一堵截漏洞。具体内容如下： – 泰国中央银行负责封堵黄金交易通道，要求通过线上平台进行销售的大型金店上报以泰铢计价的买卖信息，并督促金融机构对异常大量购买黄金的客户加强风险审查； – 证券交易委员会负责堵截数字资产通道，规定平台在每次交易中须相互传递转账方与收款方信息，即实施“旅行规则”，防止数字货币成为难以追踪的中转环节； – 反洗钱办公室提升预警效率，要求相关经营者通过电子系统即时上报异常交易，避免因上报延迟导致资金早已转移至难以追回之处； – 商业发展厅负责封堵代持股通道，加强对有外籍人士参股或担任董事、存在代持风险特征的公司核查，防止其沦为资金出境前“洗白”的中转站。 埃尼提进一步表示，上述四项措施将通过“基于用户授权的合规知识与加密数据交换平台”——即“CHECKED”系统——整合为一条完整的监管链条。 谈及社会将获得的益处，埃尼提表示，该战略将在多个层面产生积极影响。对于直接受害者而言，被骗资金将有更大机会被冻结或追回，因为执法人员无需再耗费时间逐级向多个部门索取数据。对于普通民众而言，黄金、数字资产及代理公司等洗钱渠道被同步封堵，将使以泰国为资金过境地的犯罪团伙成本上升，从而在长远上减少新增受害者的数量。在国家层面，建立互联互通的核查系统有助于提升泰国金融监管标准，与国际接轨，降低泰国被列入洗钱高风险国家名单的可能。一旦被列入该名单
title_cn: 泰国正式启用「CHECKED」金融监管系统 严打诈骗资金链
summary_cn: 泰国副总理兼财政部长埃尼提宣布启用「CHECKED」金融数据核查系统，整合央行、证券委、反洗钱办、商业部四部门数据切断电信诈骗和洗钱资金链。系统通过监管黄金交易、数字资产转账、异常交易上报及代理公司代持股等四个关键环节构建完整资金追踪链条。这将帮助受害者追回被骗资金，同时降低泰国洗钱高风险国家评级，助力泰国金融体系国际化。

title: Chiang Mai bar returns 150,000 baht to British man after overcharging dispute
desc: Chiang Mai bar returns 150,000 baht to British man after overcharging dispute Legacy A British man filed a complaint against a karaoke bar in Chiang Mai , claiming he was overcharged by 150,000 baht at the venue . The bar initially denied the accusation but eventually refunded the full amount following public scrutiny. The British man and his Thai wife filed a complaint with Mueang Chiang Mai Police Station against the karaoke bar operator and employees. Both parties attended a mediation meeting at the police station on the evening of yesterday, July 13. According to the couple, they live in Hang Dong district, while the karaoke bar is located on near the old moat in central Chiang Mai. Speaking on behalf of her husband, the Thai woman said the incident began after her husband’s British friend visited Chiang Mai on June 28. The pair had dinner and drinks at an Italian restaurant before travelling to the karaoke bar. She said both men were intoxicated when they arrived at the venue. Photo via MGR Online According to the complainant, the two British men decided to leave after spending some time at the bar, with the British visitor paying a bill of 700 baht. The Thai wife allege

title: 曼谷餐吧火灾30人死亡，市长下令严查！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰国媒体报道7月13日凌晨，曼谷拉抛区一家集餐饮与酒吧于一体的啤酒餐吧发生严重火灾。 7月14日，曼谷市长查察宣布成立调查委员会，全面调查事故原因及监管漏洞，同时下令对全市酒吧、餐厅等娱乐场所开展专项安全检查，进一步加强消防安全管理。 据最新统计，事故已造成30人死亡，另有3名遇难者身份尚未确认，76人受伤，其中36人已出院。 查察表示，市政府将全面检讨现行监管制度，并与内政部研究完善相关法律。他指出，涉事场所登记为餐厅，不属于娱乐场所，因此未适用部分针对娱乐场所的消防和建筑安全规定，暴露出现行法规存在监管空白。 为防止类似事故再次发生，曼谷市政府将扩大检查范围，在现有法律基础上提高安全标准，把娱乐场所适用的防火材料、消防设施等检查要求延伸至餐厅及类似经营场所。同时，各区将增加突击检查，重点排查营业期间安全出口是否畅通、消防设备及应急照明是否正常运作，并模拟突发情况检验场所应急能力。 针对涉事啤酒餐吧曾被举报超时营业却未得到有效处理一事，查察表示，已要求各区每月汇总辖区内涉嫌违规营业的餐厅、酒吧等场所信息，移交警方及相关部门依法处理，同时收集涉嫌灰色产业等违法经营线索，强化联合执法。 此外，对于部分伤者在72小时紧急医疗保障期结束后面临高额医疗费用的问题，曼谷市政府表示将协调有关部门与医院沟通，研究进一步提供协助。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：naewna） The post 曼谷餐吧火灾30人死亡，市长下令严查！ appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 贸易、投资、AI、人形机器人齐亮相！2026泰中合作博览会即将开幕
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 第二届“2026泰中合作博览会”（Thailand–China Cooperation Expo 2026）将于7月22日至25日在曼谷IMPACT Muang Thong Thani会展中心举行。本届博览会由泰国贸易院、泰国中华总商会、泰国中国企业总商会联合IMPACT会展中心主办，以“Investing for the Future, Growing Together”为理念，汇聚泰中两国商界及企业代表，打造覆盖贸易、投资、科技创新、教育及产业合作的一站式交流平台，进一步推动泰中经贸合作迈向更高水平。 7月2日，博览会新闻发布会在曼谷IMPACT会展中心举行。中国驻泰国大使馆经商处公使衔参赞江伟在致辞中表示，泰中两国经济合作已形成“你中有我、我中有你”的良好发展格局，为双方带来了广阔的发展机遇和丰硕成果。他希望博览会继续发挥桥梁纽带作用，进一步深化双边经贸合作。泰国贸易院主席陈培强、泰国中华总商会主席林楚钦、泰国中国企业总商会主席刘全雷及IMPACT会展管理有限公司首席执行官黄瑞鹏等嘉宾也分别介绍了本届博览会的筹备情况及特色亮点，并邀请泰中两国工商界及社会各界积极参与，共襄盛举。 据介绍，本届博览会将围绕贸易、投资、技术创新、教育、就业及商业网络连接等多个领域展开，全面展示泰中产业合作成果，打造覆盖产业链上下游的交流合作平台。目前，博览会已吸引来自270家知名企业参展，共设逾670个展位，重点聚焦科技创新、贸易投资、绿色能源、电动汽车、物流及食品饮料等未来产业领域。主办方表示，过去10年来，中国对泰国投资增长超过100%，不仅带动了资本流入，也促进了知识、技术创新及就业机会的提升，尤其在东部经济走廊建设中成效显著。 本届博览会的一大亮点，是全球最新款人形机器人将首次在中国以外公开亮相。该机器人拥有接近人类的灵活运动能力、逼真的触感表面，并搭载可互动、学习及执行复杂任务的人工智能系统，展现人工智能与智能制造领域的最新成果。 除企业展览外，博览会期间还将举办B2B商务配对活动，为泰中企业提供面对面洽谈合作的平台；现场同步举办招聘会，提供与中国企业相关的逾2,279个就业岗位，涵盖475个职位类别；教育展则汇聚中国知名高校及泰国教育机构等30余所院校，提供逾900个奖学金名额，进一步促进两国教育交流、人才培养及青年发展。 为进一步便利企业开展投资合作，博览会特别设立“咨询区”，由泰国海关厅、泰国投资促进委员会、东部经济走廊办公室、泰国工业园区管理局等9个政府部门联合提供投资、进出口、优惠政策及经商相关咨询服务，为企业提供一站式支持。 主办方表示，创新技术与产业合作正成为推动经济增长的重要动力，希望通过本届博览会进一步促进投资合作、商业交流及人才培养，打造连接泰中两国产业链的重要平台，为泰中两国产业合作和经贸往来持续注入新动能，共同开

title: Thailand climb to 17th as FIVB releases new world rankings after VNL 2026
desc: Thailand climb to 17th as FIVB releases new world rankings after VNL 2026 Legacy Thailand’s women’s volleyball team have climbed five places in the FIVB world rankings, the biggest jump of any nation, after the preliminary round of the Volleyball Nations League 2026 wrapped up on Sunday, July 13. The International Volleyball Federation (FIVB) released its updated rankings after all 18 teams completed their 12 preliminary matches across three weeks of competition, which began on June 3. Thailand added 17.50 ranking points during the tournament, lifting the side from 22nd to 17th in the world with 189.26 points. The surge was powered by a stunning straight-sets victory over second-ranked Brazil in the final week in Osaka, Japan, one of the biggest upsets of this year’s competition. The new rankings also marked the return of Russia, who re-entered the standings in ninth place with 277.59 points after their suspension from international volleyball was lifted. At the top, defending champions Italy remain the world number one on 467.01 points, ahead of Brazil on 400.56 and the United States on 371.71. title: Bangkok tuk-tuk driver returns Japanese tourist’s lost wallet
desc: Bangkok tuk-tuk driver returns Japanese tourist’s lost wallet Legacy A tuk-tuk driver in Bangkok returned a Japanese tourist’s lost wallet after finding it near Tha Chang yesterday, July 13, giving the first-time visitor an unexpected end to his trip. The wallet was found by Thanawat, a tuk-tuk driver and vendor operating near Tha Chang. He reported the discovery through a Line OA group for participants in a programme that helps protect tourists from exploitation around the Grand Palace . Officers examined the wallet and found documents identifying the owner as a Japanese tourist , along with around 15,000 yen (around 3,097 baht) in cash and several credit cards. They contacted the owner and arranged to return the wallet later that day. Photo via DailyNews DailyNews reported that at 4.30pm, Thanawat joined Tourist Police officers to return the wallet and all of its contents to the tourist, who confirmed that nothing was missing. The Japanese tourist said he and his companion were visiting Thailand for the first time and were due to fly home that night. summary_cn: 曼谷一名三轮车司机在差遣码头（Tha Chang）附近发现日本游客遗失的钱包，并通过旅游警察保护计划的微信群组上报。钱包内共有约15000日元（约3097泰铢）现金及多张信用卡。旅游警察随即联系失主并于当天下午4点半完整归还。这位首次赴泰国旅游的游客对遗失物品的完璧归赵感到惊喜，原本已做好丧失的心理准备。

title: Start in Bangkok, graduate in Switzerland with AIHM’s hospitality management programme
desc: Start in Bangkok, graduate in Switzerland with AIHM’s hospitality management programme Legacy Most hospitality management degrees put students in a classroom and call it preparation. AIHM does something structurally different. Students spend two and a half years inside a real luxury hotel in one of the world’s busiest tourism cities, complete two industry internships, and then have the option to transfer to Les Roches in Switzerland or Spain for their final year, graduating with a Les Roches degree. It is a two-country education built around one industry, and it is only available in Bangkok. AIHM, the Asian Institute of Hospitality & Management , was founded by Minor Hotels, which operates over 640+ properties across 66 countries. The BBA in Global Hospitality Management is taught in academic association with Les Roches, a QS five-star institution ranked consistently among the top four hospitality schools in the world. The curriculum is 90% aligned between the two campuses, which means students who transfer do not repeat courses. They carry their momentum forward. title_cn: 曼谷出发、瑞士毕业：AIHM 酒店管理项目国际升学路
summary_cn: 亚洲酒店管理学院（AIHM）由 Minor Hotels 创办，与全球顶级酒店学府 Les Roches 合作，提供独特的双国教育模式。学生先在曼谷豪华酒店完成 2.5 年的实战培训，并完成两次行业实习，之后可选择转入瑞士或西班牙校区完成最后一年学业，获得 Les Roches 学位。该项目仅在曼谷开设。
desc_original: Start in Bangkok, graduate in Switzerland with AIHM’s hospitality management programme Legacy Most hospitality management degrees put students in a classroom and call it preparation. AIHM does something structurally different. Students spend two and a half years inside a real luxury hotel in one of the world’s busiest tourism cities, complete two industry internships, and then have the option to transfer to Les Roches in Switzerland or Spain for their final year, graduating with a Les Roches degree. It is a two-country education built around one industry, and it is only available in Bangkok. AIHM, the Asian Institute of Hospitality & Management , was founded by Minor Hotels, which operates over 640+ properties across 66 countries. The BBA in Global Hospitality Management is taught in academic association with Les Roches, a QS five-star institution ranked consistently among the top four hospitality schools in the world. The curriculum is 90% aligned between the two campuses, which means students who transfer do not repeat courses. They carry their momentum forward. When Melissa So, a student from Cambodia, chose AIHM, the transfer pathway was central to that decision

title: Agency pursues growth through niche tourism
desc: Thailand is aiming for 2.76–2.9 trillion baht in tourism revenue from both international and domestic markets in 2027, focusing on boosting high-spending and niche segments, according to the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT).
title_cn: 泰国聚焦小众旅游开拓高端市场 2027 年收入目标 2.76-2.9 万亿泰铢
summary_cn: 泰国旅游局（TAT）公布 2027 年旅游收入目标，预期国内外市场共达 2.76-2.9 万亿泰铢。面对竞争加剧，泰国政策转向高消费游客和小众旅游细分市场，不再单纯追求客流量增长，而是着眼于提升旅游业经济效益和客户质量，推动行业可持续发展。
desc_original: Thailand is aiming for 2.76–2.9 trillion baht in tourism revenue from both international and domestic markets in 2027, focusing on boosting high-spending and niche segments, according to the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT).

title: 比亚迪泰国累计交付突破13万辆本地化制造与产品布局持续深化
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年7月12日，比亚迪汽车（泰国）有限公司宣布，比亚迪新能源汽车在泰国市场累计交付量正式突破13万辆。同时，泰国工厂迎来投产两周年，BYD SEALION 5 DM-i代言人正式亮相，BYD SEALION 5 DM-i Standard版预售价同步公布。 此次发布的一系列重要进展，充分展现了比亚迪在泰国市场的发展成果，也彰显了企业坚持长期发展战略、持续推进本地化发展的坚定决心。未来，比亚迪将继续深化本地布局，携手产业伙伴共同推动泰国新能源汽车产业发展，为泰国绿色交通转型贡献更多力量。 活动当天，比亚迪汽车（泰国）有限公司总经理柯育滨等嘉宾出席活动，与合作伙伴、中泰媒体及消费者代表共同见证这一重要时刻。 活动现场，比亚迪迎来了泰国市场第130,000辆新能源汽车的正式交付。这一具有里程碑意义的车辆为 BYD SEALION 5 DM-i ，车主为电影《给阿嬷的情书》主演“阿嬷”饰演者乌萨·森坎（Usa Samkham）。此次交付不仅见证了比亚迪累计交付突破13万辆的重要时刻，也反映出新能源汽车正获得越来越多泰国消费者的认可。 活动当天，比亚迪泰国工厂迎来投产两周年。这是比亚迪首个海外乘用车生产基地，位于罗勇府WHA工业园，设计年产能15万辆，目前已实现BYD DOLPHIN、BYD ATTO 3、BYD SEAL 5 DM-i、BYD SEALION 5 DM-i及BYD SEALION 6 DM-i五款车型本地化生产，并全部获得泰国工业联合会（FTI）颁发的Made in Thailand（MiT）认证。 两年来，比亚迪持续深化本地化发展，罗勇工厂累计创造超过5,000个就业岗位，泰籍员工占比约93%，本地零部件采购比例达到50%，持续带动泰国汽车产业链协同发展，为泰国新能源汽车产业发展持续贡献力量。 活动当天，比亚迪正式宣布泰国知名演员邝玲玲（Lingling Sirilak Kwong）担任 BYD SEALION 5 DM-i 车型代言人。作为深受泰国年轻消费者喜爱的公众人物，邝玲玲积极、自信、充满活力的形象，与BYD SEALION 5 DM-i年轻、智能、环保的产品定位高度契合。未来，双方将携手开展品牌推广活动，进一步提升BYD SEALION 5 DM-i在泰国市场的品牌影响力，让更多消费者体验DM-i超级混动技术带来的绿色出行新体验。 与此同时，比亚迪正式公布BYD SEALION 5 DM-i Standard版预售价，进一步丰富DM-i产品矩阵，为消费者提供更具价值的购车选择。新车型搭载DM-i超级混动技术，兼具低油耗、长续航、强动力等优势，以更亲民的价格和丰富配置，让更多消费者轻松体验”可加油的电动车”，进一步满足泰国消费者多元化的新能源出行需求。 比亚迪汽车（泰国）有限公司总经

summary_cn: 泰国中央财务部门计划全面改革公务员医疗保险制度，目标控制年支出（目前高达 9 万亿泰铢）并遏制贪腐。新举措包括强制医疗费直接支付、加重违法处罚、向公务员提供保障选择权和强化药物管理，防止费用滥用和药品转卖等问题。
